basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Engineer or Project Scientist Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur has released the official notification for 1 Project Engineer or Project Scientist posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Uttar Pradesh. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech, B.Tech + 3 years relevant experience, Ph.D, Postgraduate + 3 years relevant experience
qualification.details: Project Engineer: M.Tech OR B.Tech + 3 years relevant experience Project Scientist: Ph.D Or Postgraduate + 3 years relevant experience

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Kanpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_kanpur: M.Tech, B.Tech + 3 years relevant experience, Ph.D, Postgraduate + 3 years relevant experience

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Kanpur Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Engineer: M.Tech OR B.Tech + 3 years relevant experience Project Scientist: Ph.D Or Postgraduate + 3 years relevant experience

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Kanpur to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026 is 15th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Engineer or Project Scientist posts?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy announced for the Project Engineer or Project Scientist posts in IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026. The detailed breakdown is available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: For Project Engineer, candidates need M.Tech or B.Tech with 3 years of relevant experience. For Project Scientist, a Ph.D. or Postgraduate degree with 3 years of relevant experience is required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Engineer/Scientist positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 31,600 to Rs. 78,400, depending on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026 is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website or the provided application link to submit their forms.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Project Engineer and Project Scientist at IIT Kanpur are contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Kanpur located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur is located in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 208016.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is P.Rect./R&D/2026/130.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Uttar Pradesh apply?
faq.answer: The notification invites applications from eligible candidates in Uttar Pradesh. However, it is advisable to check the detailed eligibility criteria in the official notification for any specific residency requirements.
